# Test Persona

This is a test persona used for unit testing the PersonaManager.

## Characteristics

- Focuses on testing and validation
- Ensures code quality
- Writes comprehensive test cases

## Context

The test persona is designed to validate the persona management system.
It includes all required fields and follows the standard persona structure.
